response.justification: Aisha brings well over the required 6 years of full-stack experience, with a strong TypeScript/Node.js foundation, React and MongoDB in production at Optilyz, AWS and Kubernetes exposure, and current hands-on AI-agent infrastructure work (MCP code generators, agentic frameworks) at re:cinq — a rare direct match for the AI agent development requirement. A deep testing and software-craftsmanship background (TDD, test tooling authorship, workshops) fits the quality-focused culture of the role. Gaps are modest: no explicit Nest.js or Kotlin experience, and much of the frontend history is Ember rather than React, but the breadth and depth suggest fast ramp-up.
strengths: Current AI-agent and MCP tooling experience matching the role's AI agent development requirement
Long TypeScript/Node.js track record with React, MongoDB, AWS CDK, Docker/Kubernetes in production
Strong testing and craftsmanship background (TDD, built test frameworks, taught testing courses)
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience listed in the primary stack
Kotlin not mentioned; Java exposure appears dated (robotics work, 2016-2018)
Frontend depth skews toward Ember.js; React experience is comparatively recent and narrower

key_factors.factor: TypeScript/Node.js full-stack depth and years of experience
Missing Nest.js and Kotlin from primary/secondary stack
